title: Magi: Adventure of Sinbad
sourceNotes: Prequel spin-off to Magi (distinct source manga "Magi: The Adventures of Sinbad", AniList 78025). Single 13-episode TV season (Lay-duce, 2016), so episodes are non-cumulative. The anime is a compressed adaptation ending at chapter 55 (end of the Artemyra Arc) — community guides advise resuming the manga at ch. 55. Arc chapter boundaries per the Magi wiki / magimanga arc guide; per-episode assignments to those five arcs are approximate due to pacing. Manga complete at 182 chapters (19 volumes, ended 2018). Arcs from ch. 56 (Slave Arc) onward are unadapted. A separate 5-episode OVA (AniList 20609) covers the early Baal/Valefor material and is not mapped here.
